creator: dweimer@dweimer.net
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #2)
I believe this may have in part been my fault, I also reported a bug in the dependency devel/propro2 as needing ignore with php 7.4 removed however that one wasn't marked ignore, I filed it under the wrong dependency it should have been devel/pecl-raphf2 which is also marked ignore with 7.4 and in turn would prevent this from building in automated port tests. Filing that bug report now to see if we can get this put back in.
